text.title: GitLab CI/CD Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Lint + unit + build all in 'test' stage run sequentially though independent.
antipattern.fix: Add needs declarations to form DAG.

antipattern.symptom: Token leaks in CI log of a fork merge request.
antipattern.fix: Set masked: true + protected: true on every credential.

antipattern.symptom: Pipeline cannot express composite condition (branch=main AND tag!~/wip-.*/).
Vulnerability ships unnoticed; postmortem reveals zero security gate.
antipattern.fix: Add SAST + secret_detection via include template.
